items.given: tmp lifecycle file with one prior entry for agent dev with new_score=52
items.then: exit 0; lifecycle gains exactly 1 new line; line 1 byte-identical pre/post; new line is valid 9-field JSON with prev_score=52, delta=-2, unclamped_score=50, new_score=50, event='manual_reversal', reason='test reversal', agent='dev'. Also: --delta -2 without --reason exits 1 stderr '--reason'; --delta with --event exits 1 stderr 'mutually exclusive' (codex F4); empty lifecycle + --delta +3 --expected-prev-score 50 produces prev_score=50 (codex F6 fresh-file baseline); wrong --expected-prev-score 40 exits 3 (CAS).

preconditions: tmp lifecycle file with 1 dev entry @ new_score=52
assertions: exit code matches expected per sub-scenario
lifecycle JSONL byte-identical except for appended last line where applicable
appended line is valid JSON with all 9 fields in canonical order

items.given: tmp lifecycle file with TWO entries for agent ba: A(ts=2026-05-29T20:00:00Z, delta=+1, new_score=51) and B(ts=2026-05-29T20:05:00Z, delta=+2, new_score=53)
items.then: exit 0; third line appended with prev_score=53, delta=-2, unclamped_score=51, new_score=51, event='manual_reversal', reason='premature scoring', agent='ba'; lines 1+2 byte-identical pre/post. Also: --undo of non-existent ts exits 4 stderr 'not found'; ambiguous (ts,agent) pair exits 4 stderr 'ambiguous' (codex F7); malformed target delta exits 2 (codex F7); --undo without --reason exits 1; --undo with --delta exits 1 stderr 'mutually exclusive' (codex F4); chain undo of a manual_reversal entry exits 0 (codex F8).

assertions: no append on failure paths; lifecycle byte-identical
on success, appended line has delta = -target.delta, agent unchanged, event='manual_reversal'

items.given: tmp lifecycle file + test-controlled docs/dev/close-report-99999999-999999.md path
items.when: bash scripts/score-update.sh --agent dev --event close_success_qa_pass --note '99999999-999999' --lifecycle-file <tmp> under varied close-report states
items.then: no close-report exists -> exit 5 stderr 'precondition unmet'; CLOSE: NO last line -> exit 5; CLOSE: YES last line -> exit 0 with proper append; CLOSE: YES (FORCED) -> exit 5 (codex F9 FORCED excluded); --note '' -> exit 5 stderr 'task-id'; --note 'not-a-task-id' -> exit 5 stderr 'YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS' (codex F11); --event close_fail_qa_pass with no close-report -> exit 0 (close_fail_* NOT gated); --allow-close-success-without-report -> exit 1 stderr 'Unknown argument' (codex F1 — flag removed). In all failure modes, lifecycle byte-identical.

assertions: FORCED detection via 'FORCED' in last_line.upper() (codex F9)

items.when: Step 3 'Mascot scoring -- close outcome' section is read
items.then: contains phrase 'last non-empty line'; explicit conditional 'if close-report file does not exist OR last non-empty line does not classify as yes OR contains FORCED, SKIP all close_success_* score updates'; references shared helper hooks/lib/close-verdict (or hooks.lib.close_verdict) by name; 4 scoring branches still named (close_success_qa_pass, close_success_qa_fail_fixed, close_fail_qa_pass, close_fail_qa_fail); close_fail_* not gated; --force CLOSE: YES (FORCED) skip text intact.

assertions: regex match for 'last non-empty line' OR equivalent
regex match for 'FORCED' AND skip-text proximity
